description: For AI assistants handling product demos, pricing questions, and inbound sales conversations.

criteria.label: Use Case Discovery
criteria.description: Does the agent identify the prospect's specific use case before pitching?
criteria.pass_example: User says 'we have a 50-person team' → agent tailors response to team size
criteria.fail_example: User says 'we have a 50-person team' → agent gives generic product overview

criteria.label: No Hallucination
criteria.description: Does the agent avoid making up pricing or feature details not in the provided context?
criteria.pass_example: I don't have the exact pricing for that tier, let me connect you with someone who does.
criteria.fail_example: Our enterprise plan is $50 per seat per month. (when no pricing was in context)

criteria.label: Specific Next Step
criteria.description: Does the agent include a specific next step to advance the conversation?
criteria.pass_example: Want me to set up a 20-minute demo for Thursday?
criteria.fail_example: Let me know if you have any other questions.

criteria.label: Objection Acknowledgment
criteria.description: Does the agent handle objections by acknowledging them before responding?
criteria.pass_example: That's a fair concern about pricing. Here's how other teams your size have thought about it...
criteria.fail_example: Our product is actually very affordable for what you get.
